speaker: SPEAKER_09
text: And we can formulate an optimization problem. speaker: SPEAKER_09

speaker: SPEAKER_09
text: And in this way that we can split this difficult question into two sub-questions. In each sub-question, it's become simpler because we only need to handle one of the unknown. So to perform alternating optimization, we first assume we already know one of these unknown practices, such as we already know where the center of the cluster mu k is.
